description: CompositionGreen striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with V-neck, short puffed sleeves, front buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a vented hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash with like colours in cold waterWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm ironAdd a work wear inspired element to your off-duty wardrobe with this shirt from a label loved for its cool styling - s.oliver. Style this with a form fitting denims or skirts to turn heads at upscale weekend dos.Model statisticsThe product is a size 38 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
